phrases.intent_en: Ask where the free zoo is located inside the park
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le zoo dans le parc, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh ZOH dahn luh PARK, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Parc de la Tête d'Or has one of France's largest free-access zoos. Giraffes, rhinos, and big cats are among the residents. Entry to the park and zoo is always free.

responses.english: Near the main entrance, on the left.
responses.phonetic: preh duh lahn-TRAY prehn-see-PAL, soor lah GOHSH
responses.french: Près de l'entrée principale, sur la gauche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask to rent a rowing boat on the lake
phrases.text_local: Est-il possible de louer un bateau à rames sur le lac ?
phrases.pronunciation: eh-TEEL poh-SEEBL duh loo-AY uhn bah-TOH ah RAM soor luh LAK
phrases.cultural_note: The park's central lake offers pedalo and rowing boat hire during warmer months. It is a popular activity for families on sunny afternoons.

phrases.text_local: La roseraie est-elle accessible en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah roh-zuh-REH eh-TEL ak-ses-EEBL ahn suh moh-MAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The park's roseraie (rose garden) contains over 16,000 rose bushes across 350 varieties. It is at its most spectacular in late May and June.

responses.english: In the centre of the park, south direction.
responses.phonetic: oh SAHN-truh doo PARK, dee-rek-SYOHN SOOD
responses.french: Au centre du parc, direction sud.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to hire a bicycle
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on louer des vélos dans le parc ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TOHN loo-AY day VAY-loh dahn luh PARK
phrases.cultural_note: Bicycles can be hired at the park gates. The flat paths make it excellent for cycling. You can also use Lyon's public Vélo'v bike-sharing scheme at nearby stations.

responses.english: At the north entrance of the park.

phrases.intent_en: Ask whether the park is open at night
phrases.text_local: Le parc est-il ouvert la nuit ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh PARK eh-TEEL oo-VAIRT lah NWEE
phrases.cultural_note: The park closes at dusk (around 21h00 in summer, earlier in winter). During the Fête des Lumières in December, special evening events are sometimes held within the park.

responses.phonetic: wee, zhoos-KAH vehn-DUH UHR ahn ay-TAY
responses.french: Oui, jusqu'à vingt-deux heures en été.
